summary: Stellar Hand Jive performance captured on one of the best audience recordings of the ’86 tour.
review: Both reviewers rave about a superb Hand Jive rendition and commend the tape as one of the finest audience recordings from 1986, noting its clear and well‑balanced sound. The show itself isn’t described in detail beyond that highlight, but the recording quality makes it highly listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Two high‑star reviews (5 and 4) praise both the performance of Hand Jive and the excellent audience recording quality, leading to a strong combined rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced audience capture; praised as one of the best audience recordings of the 1986 tour with good overall sound and minimal noise.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Specific set details not mentioned; Hand Jive is highlighted as a peak moment.
